text: **Anna:** Washington DC has {great|素晴らしい/素敵な|/ɡreɪt/|Great job today!} food from all over the world.
**Anna:** Today I'm having {lunch|昼食|/lʌntʃ/|Let's have lunch together.} with my boss.
**Anna:** Weaver says we're going on a {trip|旅行/遠出|/trɪp/|Let's take a trip.} around the world.
**Anna:** But she knows I only have an hour for lunch, {silly|おバカな/くだらない|/ˈsɪli/|Don't be silly.} woman.
**Anna:** Hey, we are {meeting|会う/出会う|/ˈmiːtɪŋ/|Let's meet at the cafe.} Miss Weaver for lunch at noon, aren't we?
**Anna:** So where is this world food {restaurant|レストラン|/ˈrestərɒnt/|Let's eat at a restaurant.}?
**Caty:** We are not eating at a restaurant.
**Caty:** We are eating at {food trucks|移動販売車|/fuːd trʌks/|Food trucks sell delicious meals.}
**Caty:** Okay, Jonathan, you will buy the first dish.
**Anna:** {Surprise|驚かせる/びっくりさせる|/sərˈpraɪz/|I have a surprise for you.} us.
**Jonathan:** Okay, I'll be back in 15 minutes.
**Anna:** What country do I want to visit?
**Anna:** Anna, you pick the second country.
**Anna:** I want {chicken|鶏肉|/ˈtʃɪkən/|Chicken is my favorite meat.}
**Caty:** The food truck over there has great chicken
**Anna:** After you buy your {food|食べ物/料理|/fuːd/|I love trying new food.}, meet me here.
**Jonathan:** {Excuse me|すみません|/ɪkˈskjuːz miː/|Excuse me, can I help you?}, I'll have the shrimp
**Jonathan:** Okay, I'll have the beef then.
**Anna:** Hello, I want the {chicken|鶏肉/鶏料理|/ˈtʃɪkɪn/|Chicken is a popular meat.} dish.
**Anna:** I'll try another {food truck|移動販売車|/fuːd trʌk/|Food trucks sell quick meals.}
**Jonathan:** The dish is seven dollars, so here is one.
**Jonathan:** Two, three dollars back from your ten.
**Jonathan:** Is she {dancing|踊る|/ˈdænsɪŋ/|Kids are dancing at the party.} by that food truck?
**Caty:** Well, we still have eight dollars.
**Caty:** What do you want {now|今|/naʊ/|I want to go home now.}?
**Anna:** We can buy {dessert|デザート|/dɪˈzɜːrt/|I love chocolate dessert.}
**Anna:** I'll buy {dessert|デザート|/dɪˈzɜːrt/|Let's share this dessert.}

**Anna:** In Washington, DC, you can {travel|旅行する/移動する|/ˈtrævəl/|We travel by car.} around the {world|世界|/wɜːrld/|The world is big.} with {food trucks|移動販売車|/fuːd trʌks/|Food trucks sell tasty meals.}, and it does not cost a {lot|たくさん/多く|/lɑːt/|I have a lot of books.}
